prompt: Trace the early history of the Elmstead Amateur Radio Archive in Elmstead. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Give the final answer as exactly three bullets labeled Answer, Evidence, and Caveat; include the source ID in Evidence.

fetch_primary.title: Elmstead Amateur Radio Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Elmstead Amateur Radio Archive began in the caretaker's office in the former telegraph exchange. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
